plugins.name: common
plugins.description: Stack-agnostic dev workflow: git & GitHub, debugging, quality gates, TDD, planning, code review, repo hygiene, secrets, TypeScript, tests, and Claude worker orchestration.

plugins.name: web
plugins.description: Web frontend (React/Next/Vite): design, Tailwind, UI/UX, Framer Motion, React best-practices/composition, shadcn, Storybook, Playwright, TanStack (Query/Form/Table), Turborepo, Vercel deploy, API-only client/server boundary, frontend state policy.

plugins.name: rn
plugins.description: React Native / Expo mobile. (Placeholder — 아직 스킬 없음. RN 프로젝트 시작 시 skills/에 추가.)

plugins.name: supabase
plugins.description: Supabase + Postgres: client/SSR, auth/RLS, migrations, query & schema best-practices.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Throwaway HTML mockups / design exploration before building: claude-design, sketch.

plugins.name: visuals
plugins.description: Standalone visual assets from a prompt: architecture/infra diagrams (SVG/HTML), Excalidraw flowcharts & sequence diagrams, and infographics (layouts × styles).
